Short CV

Born in 1987 in Amasya Merzifon, Ayşe Bağlı completed her primary, secondary and high school education in Merzifon. She graduated from Amasya University, School of Health, Department of Nursing in 2010. As a nurse, she worked at Ankara Training and Research Hospital, Anesthesia and Reanimation Intensive Care and Adult Emergency Service between 2011 and 2015; and at Kocaeli Derince Training and Research Hospital, Pediatric Emergency Service between 2015 and 2017. She started working as a lecturer at Üsküdar University, School of Health Services, First and Emergency Aid Program in the 2017-2018 Academic Year. She completed her Master's Degree in Psychiatric Nursing at Üsküdar University, Department of Nursing in 2021.
